title: Medevac Frontier
subject: STEM
description: A cinematic tactical flight experience built around control, judgement, rapid decision-making and iterative improvement.

title: UAS Register
subject: Cross-curricular
description: Register, evidence and claim AQA Unit Award Scheme units in one place: import the outcome sheet, tap to stamp outcomes, snap work examples, download one email-ready evidence pack.

title: ASDAN Register
subject: Cross-curricular
description: PEQ units and Short Courses in one tracker: W·P·R challenge evidence, banked hours, credits in multiples of ten, closing-document tracking and a claim-readiness board.

title: Micro:bit Missions
subject: Computing
description: A mission-led physical-computing sequence using two micro:bits, practical evidence and iterative testing.

title: Circuit Quest
subject: Physics
description: A gamified whole-class exploration of mains electricity, circuit behaviour and electrical safety.

title: Digital Decisions
subject: Digital literacy
description: A fast-paced digital-safety session built around choices, discussion and realistic online scenarios.

title: Evidence Binder
subject: Cross-curricular
description: A structured evidence and progress tool for recording practical work, outcomes and next steps.
